game_info.title: BlockCraft 3D
game_info.concept:
Dive into an open world of building, crafting and survival. Gather resources, survive the night, and build whatever you can imagine one block at a time. Explore and craft your way through a completely open world where you can play with friends, build a city, start a farm, mine deep into the ground, face mysterious enemies, or just experiment to the limits of your imagination! 

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/minecraft-dream-it-build-it/id479516143

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Dive into an open world of building, crafting and survival. Gather resources, survive the night, and build whatever you can imagine one block at a time. Explore and craft your way through a completely open world where you can play with friends, build a city, start a farm, mine deep into the ground, face mysterious enemies, or just experiment to the limits of your imagination! 
 
The possibilities are endless. Embark on an epic adventure and play with friends, building from the ground up. Build and expand in Creative mode, where you can craft from unlimited resources. Survive the night, face intense battles, craft tools, and fend off danger in Survival mode. With seamless cross-platform and multiplayer gameplay on Minecraft: Bedrock Edition, you can adventure solo or with friends, and discover an infinite, randomly generated world filled with blocks to mine, biomes to explore, and mobs to befriend (or battle)!  
 
In Minecraft, the world is yours to shape! 
 
CREATE YOUR WORLD 
• Build anything from the ground up 
• Craft from special resources and tools to create brand new structures and landscapes 
• Explore an endless open world full of different biomes and creatures 
• Minecraft Marketplace – Get creator-made add-ons, thrilling worlds, and stylish cosmetics on Minecraft Marketplace 
• Connect with millions of players on community servers, or subscribe to Realms Plus to cross-play with up to 10 friends on your own private server 
• Slash commands – Tweak how the game plays: you can change the weather, summon mobs, change the time of day, and more 
• Add-ons – Customize your experience even further with add-ons! If you're more tech-inclined, you can modify your game to create new resource packs 
 
MULTIPLAYER ONLINE GAMES 
• Join free massive multiplayer servers and play with thousands of others 
• Multiplayer servers allow you to play with up to 4 players online with a free Xbox Live account 
• Build, battle and explore other realms. With Realms and Realms Plus, you can play with up to 10 friends cross-platform, anytime, anywhere on Realms, your own private server that we host for you 
• With Realms Plus, get instant access to over 150 Marketplace items with new additions each month. Share with friends on your own private Realms server*  
• Connect and play with players across the world, wherever they are, and join in on MMO battles for survival in other worlds 
• Discover gigantic community-run worlds, compete in unique mini-games and socialize in lobbies full of fellow Minecrafters 
 
SUPPORT: https://www.minecraft.net/help 
LEARN MORE: https://www.minecraft.net/ 

Here are the links to our Privacy Policy and Terms and Conditions:
Privacy Policy: https://www.minecraft.net/privacy/gdpr
Terms and Conditions: https://account.mojang.com/terms
 
MINIMUM RECOMMENDED SPECIFICATION 
 
To check the requirements for your device visit: https://help.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/articles/4409172223501 
 
*Realms & Realms Plus: Try a free 30-day trial in-app. 

Minecraft may request the following optional permissions, which require your consent. You can continue to use Minecraft without granting these permissions; however, some features may be limited or unavailable.
For more information, please see below:
• Local Network: To find other devices on the same Wi‑Fi network for multiplayer gameplay.
• App Tracking: To deliver personalized ads and improve application experience
game_info.description:
Welcome to BlockCraft 3D! An open-world voxel sandbox adventure. Explore a procedurally generated world, gather resources, and build your own structures. 
Survival Mode is active: manage your health, avoid falling off the world, and watch out for Red Creepers that spawn at night!
Use your tools to shape the terrain. The world is yours to craft.
game_info.controls:
- W / A / S / D: Move Player (Forward, Left, Backward, Right)
- Arrow Keys: Look / Rotate Camera
- Space: Jump
- Z: Interact (Mine block if Pickaxe selected / Place block if Block selected)
- Shift: Cycle Inventory Slot (Slot 0 is Pickaxe/Hand for mining, others are blocks for building)
- ESC: Pause / Unpause
- R: Restart Game (when Game Over)
- Enter: Start Game

TEST_1.strategy_description: Start the game, simulate holding the 'W' key for 60 frames. Track the player's position vector.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player's Z coordinate should decrease (move forward) relative to the starting position, indicating movement logic is functioning.
TEST_1.strategy: Start the game, simulate holding the 'W' key for 60 frames. Track the player's position vector.
TEST_1.expected: The player's Z coordinate should decrease (move forward) relative to the starting position, indicating movement logic is functioning.

test_1_ModeBtn.strategy_description: Start the game, simulate holding the 'W' key for 60 frames. Track the player's position vector.

TEST_2.strategy_description: Place the player in mid-air (y=20) above the terrain. Run the physics loop for 30 frames without input.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player's Y coordinate should decrease, demonstrating that gravity is being applied to the physics entity.
TEST_2.strategy: Place the player in mid-air (y=20) above the terrain. Run the physics loop for 30 frames without input.
TEST_2.expected: The player's Y coordinate should decrease, demonstrating that gravity is being applied to the physics entity.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Place the player directly above a solid block. Allow gravity to pull them down. Monitor vertical velocity.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player should stop falling when hitting the block (Y position stabilizes), and velocity.y should become 0 (or close to 0 due to resets).

TEST_4.strategy_description: Ensure "Pickaxe" is selected. Aim camera at a specific block coordinate. Simulate pressing 'Z'. Check world data for that coordinate.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The block at the target coordinate should change from existing (e.g., ID 1) to air (ID 0), and inventory count might increase.
TEST_4.strategy: Ensure "Pickaxe" is selected. Aim camera at a specific block coordinate. Simulate pressing 'Z'. Check world data for that coordinate.
TEST_4.expected: The block at the target coordinate should change from existing (e.g., ID 1) to air (ID 0), and inventory count might increase.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Select a "Dirt Block" in inventory. Aim at the face of an existing block. Simulate pressing 'Z'. Check world data.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: A new block of the selected type should appear at the adjacent coordinate to the target face.
TEST_5.strategy: Select a "Dirt Block" in inventory. Aim at the face of an existing block. Simulate pressing 'Z'. Check world data.

TEST_7.strategy_description: Spawn an enemy at player's location. Update game loop for a few frames to allow collision/attack logic to trigger.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Player's health should be less than the maximum starting health, triggering the damage feedback.
